Class Contractor

java.lang.Object
HumanResources.Employee
HumanResources.Contractor
All Implemented Interfaces:
DetailsDisplayable
public class Contractor extends Employee
Represents a contractor employed on a fixed-term basis in the HR system.

Contractors are paid an hourly rate and have a defined contract end date. Unlike FullTimeEmployee and PartTimeEmployee, contractors do not accrue PTO and are not benefits-eligible. The calculatePay() method returns the base hourly rate — callers must multiply by hours worked for actual pay.

See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • Contractor

      public Contractor(String employeeID, String name, String department, double hourlyRate, LocalDate contractEndDate)
      Constructs a new Contractor with all required engagement details.
      Parameters:
      employeeID - the unique identifier for this contractor (e.g., "C001")
      name - the full name of the contractor
      department - the department to which this contractor is assigned
      hourlyRate - the pay rate in dollars per hour; should be >= 0
      contractEndDate - the date on which this contractor's engagement ends; should be non-null

  • Method Details

    • getHourlyRate

      public double getHourlyRate()
      Returns the contractor's hourly pay rate.
      Returns:
      the hourly rate in dollars

    • getContractEndDate

      public LocalDate getContractEndDate()
      Returns the date on which this contractor's engagement ends.
      Returns:
      the contract end date as a LocalDate

    • setHourlyRate

      public void setHourlyRate(double hourlyRate)
      Updates the contractor's hourly pay rate.
      Parameters:
      hourlyRate - the new hourly rate in dollars; should be >= 0

    • setContractEndDate

      public void setContractEndDate(LocalDate contractEndDate)
      Updates the contract end date for this contractor.
      Parameters:
      contractEndDate - the new end date; should be non-null

    • displayInfo

      public void displayInfo()
      Displays all contractor details including hourly rate and contract end date to standard output.
      Specified by:
      displayInfo in interface DetailsDisplayable
      Specified by:
      displayInfo in class Employee

    • calculatePay

      public double calculatePay()
      Returns the contractor's base hourly rate.

      Unlike salaried or part-time employees, this method returns the raw hourly rate rather than a monthly estimate. Callers are responsible for multiplying by hours worked to compute actual compensation.

      Specified by:
      calculatePay in class Employee
      Returns:
      the hourly rate in dollars

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a concise string representation of this contractor.

      Format: [<employeeID>] <name> - Contractor | Dept: <department> | Hourly Rate: $<rate> | Contract ends: <contractEndDate>

      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      a formatted summary string
